title: aegilops tauschii subsp. strangulata
intro: Aegilops tauschii subsp. strangulata, also known as Daurian wheat grass, is a subspecies of the Aegilops tauschii plant, which belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its rich content of antioxidants and fiber. The health benefits of Daurian wheat grass include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and support the immune system. Daurian wheat grass can be prepared as herbal tea, juice, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
